chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-318 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 23.04.2025 Mr. Asif Hussain M. Nawaz Chandio, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w Inspector Abdul Ghafoor Chutto, S.H.O. P.S. Taluka, Larkana, SIP Ali Dost, on behalf of S.S.P. Larkana and SIP Zulfiquar Ali Chandio, S.H.O. P.S. Dhamrah. ------ S.H.O. P.S. Taluka, Larkana is present in person and files Statement alongwith copies of certain documents including F.I.Rs, taken on record. He submits that alleged detenue Muhammad Ismail Chandio has been arrested on 19.04.2025 in Crime No.41/2025, registered under sections 402, 324, 353, 148, 149 P.P.C at Police Station Waleed. He hands over copy of the Statement alongwith copy of the F.I.R. to counsel for petitioner; who upon receipt of same being not satisfied with the statement submits that the illegal detention is being continued. Since by virtue of prayer, the alleged detenue has been surfaced; hence scope of section 491 Cr.P.C being limited is over, therefore, instant petition is disposed of having become infructuous. However, the petitioner is at liberty to file proper application before the forum having jurisdiction, if so advised. Judge Judge Manzoor
